title: Kilner 0.25Litre Storage Jar and Shaker for Parmesan, Sprinkles, Herbs and Spices
features: STORE AND SHAKE | The Kilner 0.25 Litre / 250 ml Storage Jar and Shaker is ideal for storing and displaying dried foods, such as chocolate sprinkles, parmesan cheese, cake topping decorations along with herbs and spices,the iconic Kilner logo is embossed on the front of the jar as well as a dedicated area for placing labels to keep track of the homemade creations and keeping pantries organised and tidy
EASY-TO-USE | The high-quality stainless steel lid has two different sized openings to allow the contents to be easily dispensed, simply twist the lid to uncover the desired opening

DURABILITY | Each jar is made from high-quality sodalime glass material with pristine clarity and consistent wall thickness ensuring no weak points, the glass jar is dishwasher safe, the shaker lid should be hand washed only and dried immediately

SUSTAINABILITY | Glass is ideal for storing / preserving and transporting food and drink, it is made from natural ingredients so no harmful chemicals or toxins can leak into the food, this glass is BPA free and does not absorb odours, flavours or stains
THE KILNER STORY | The original Kilner Jar, invented by John Kilner and Co. in England is as much loved and successful now as it was over 180 years ago

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Wash before first use. Do not pour boiling water directly into jars
